source.name: sotes-mods
source.description: Francesco149's mods for Fortune Summoners: the EN-SE trainer and the Japanese voice patch. This is the default source shipped with the SotES Mod Loader.

_note: autoload has its first loader-based release (tag autoload-1.0.0, assets hosted on this repo's GitHub releases); ennse_voice + sotes_trainer are still being ported, so their versions[] stay empty until released. Convention: each mod releases under a `<id>-<version>` git tag on this repo, but a download `url` may point anywhere — a source repo can be registry-only and host files elsewhere. Schema: sotes-mod-loader/docs/REGISTRY.md.

mods.name: Auto-Load Save
mods.description: Skip the title/menu straight into a save on launch. Drives the menus via the loader's mod.game.save op; the save slot is a mod config setting (mod.toml [config]). Formerly the loader's built-in autoload flag, now a mod.

versions.notes: First loader-based release. Auto-loads a save at boot via the loader's mod.game.save op; the save slot is configurable ([config] slot, -1 = the picker's newest save).

mods.name: Japanese Voice Patch (EN-SE)
mods.description: Restores the Japanese dialogue voices in the English Special Edition. English text, Japanese spoken lines; the exe is never modified. You supply sotesx_s.dll from your own Japanese copy.

mods.name: EN-SE Trainer
mods.description: Debug/trainer mod: teleport, god mode, map graph, portal warps, dialogue skip, and a Dear ImGui UI. Built for RE and testing.
